SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") is made and entered into on the 1st day of November, 2023.

Between:

Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No. S2345678B), residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238456, and reachable at +65 9123 4567 or tanwm@example.sg; and

Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC No. S3456789C), residing at 456 Bukit Timah Road, Singapore 259757, and reachable at +65 9876 5432 or siti.abdullah@samplemail.sg; and

Ramasamy Muthu, representing Muthu Holdings Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 199876543A), with a registered address at 789 Serangoon Road, Singapore 328888.

The SPA provides for the purchase and sale of shares for a total consideration of SGD 1,000,000 (one million Singapore dollars).

Please note that this document does not reflect the current project plan or project status of any ongoing ventures. Further details can be accessed through https://example.sg/user/S2345678B.
